name: Midari Ikishima
description: A third-year student and head of the Student Council Beautification Committee. She gets pleasure from taking risks such as starting games of Russian roulette by herself. ~! As she plays a dangerous game with Yumeko while putting both of their lives on the line, she realizes taking risks is such an amazing feeling thanks to Yumeko and her past life. She lost her left eye by stabbing herself with a pen in front of the Student Council, in order to pleasure the President.!~

name: Mina Ashido

name: Isaac Netero
description: __Nen type:__ Enhancement None other than the Chairman of the Hunter Committee, and the final authority over the entirety of the Hunter Exam. name: Black☆Star
description: A shadow weapon meister and the last survivor of the infamous Star Clan, taken into the DWMA and raised by [Sid Barrett](https://anilist.co/character/16582/Sid-Barrett). His weapon partner is [Tsubaki Nakatsukasa](https://anilist.co/character/8443/Tsubaki-Nakatsukasa). He is known as one of the toughest students in the academy, being quite self-centered with a desire to always be in the spotlight.

name: Alice Nakiri
description: Alice Nakiri is a 92nd Tōtsuki Generation student and Erina Nakiri's cousin, whose cooking style is specialized in Molecular Gastronomy. Unlike her cousin though, Alice is much more friendly and cheery. She even will talk to her rivals casually, sometimes merely to poke fun at them, something she inherited from her mother. name: Joker
description: Joker is a former pyrokinetic and a self-proclaimed anti-hero that serves as the Fourth Pillar's guardian.

name: Sesshoumaru
description: Inuyasha's older half-brother. Unlike Inuyasha, Sesshoumaru is a full-blooded dog-demon and is contemptuous of InuYasha for being a half-demon and for consorting with humans. He is a very powerful demon who seems to have no true equal when it comes to raw power; although given the chance in volume twenty-three, he could not defeat Naraku.
